reviewerView.question: Should "Lease out" be merged into "Rent out"?
reviewerView.currentState: "Rent out" and "Lease out" are separate nodes under "Sell".
reviewerView.proposedState: Keep "Rent out", record "Lease out" as a synonym, and remove the separate "Lease out" node.
reviewerView.reasoning: The preceding pairwise synonym review determines whether these generic item-selling titles denote the same activity. This separate action review shows the exact node and child consolidation before any write is prepared.

provenance.sourceOntologyName: Final Hierarchy with O*Net - Rob Content Review 2026-07-24

reviewerView.question: Should "Sell Merchandise" be merged into "Sell Products"?
reviewerView.currentState: "Sell Merchandise" is under "Sell physical objects", while "Sell Products" is under "Sell (Other)".
reviewerView.proposedState: Keep "Sell Products", move its 4 direct children, record "Sell Merchandise" as a synonym, and remove the separate "Sell Merchandise" node.
reviewerView.reasoning: The preceding pairwise synonym review determines whether these generic item-selling titles denote the same activity. This separate action review shows the exact node and child consolidation before any write is prepared.
